title: Comment
description: A comment or reply left by a user.

fileKey.description: The file in which the comment lives.

parentId.description: If present, the id of the comment to which this is the reply.

createdAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time at which the comment was left.

resolvedAt.description: If set, the UTC ISO 8601 time the comment was resolved.

orderId.description: The number displayed with the comment in the UI.

reactions.description: An array of reactions to the comment.
